data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of notifying clients about new provider details. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this notification process is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for client notifications, but the absence of any concrete evidence or checks related to this functionality indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of client notification with new provider details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add notification verification endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that clients receive notifications with new provider details upon assignment.
